summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: number line 0 to N=10 with RED ruin boundary and GREEN win boundary. 5 simulations of random walk from k=4 with p=0.48; ValueTracker t_tr drives each precomputed path in sequence via always_redraw stacked trails. Final panel shows empirical vs theoretical P(win) = (1 - (q/p)^k)/(1 - (q/p)^N).
